conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours make better decisions with their data. I came across your company and was impressed with the work you're doing in experience management. Can you tell me a little bit about your current data processing workflow?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yeah. We're using a combination of in-house tools and some third-party software to manage our data. It's been working okay, but we're always looking for ways to improve. What makes DeepData AI unique?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our solution uses AI to automatically process and analyze large datasets, giving you real-time insights into your customer experience. We've seen companies like yours reduce their data processing time by up to 70% and increase their decision-making speed by 30%. We'd love to show you a demo and see if it's a good fit for your team.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds interesting, but I have to say, we're pretty happy with our current setup. We've invested a lot in our in-house tools and I'm not sure we're looking to add another vendor to the mix. Plus, I'm not sure we have the budget for it. What kind of pricing are we talking about?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is competitive with other data processing solutions on the market. We offer a tiered pricing model based on the amount of data you're processing. For a company of your size, we'd likely be looking at around $50,000 to $100,000 per year.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That's a bit steep for us, to be honest. We're in the middle of a budget cycle and I don't think we have the authority to approve a new tool like that. Plus, I'm not sure our IT team would be on board with integrating another system. We're trying to simplify our tech stack, not add to it.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns, but I think DeepData AI could really help you streamline your data processing workflow and free up more time for your team to focus on higher-level tasks. Would you be open to a demo and discussing this further with our technical team to see if we can address some of your integration concerns?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I don't think it's worth pursuing at this time. We're just not in a position to take on new vendors or tools, and I don't have the budget authority to approve a purchase like that even if I wanted to. I think we'll have to pass on DeepData AI for now.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address pricing concerns and offer more flexible pricing options or a trial to alleviate the buyer's budget worries. Sentiment: Neutral

parsed.feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address pricing concerns and offer more flexible pricing options or a trial to alleviate the buyer's budget worries. Sentiment: Neutral
